scripts.dev:api: pnpm --filter @agentpay/db build && pnpm --filter @agentpay/email build && pnpm --filter @agentpay/api dev
scripts.test:phase1: pnpm --fail-if-no-match --filter @agentpay/shared test && pnpm --fail-if-no-match --filter @agentpay/contracts test && pnpm --fail-if-no-match --filter @agentpay/api test && pnpm --fail-if-no-match --filter @agentpay/web test
